manifest.name: PARA-Tree

name: PARA-Tree

releases.author: Sparky-code
releases.description:
First public release.

PARA-Tree renders your PARA vault as a git-graph–style commit graph — **Areas are trunks, Projects are branches, Resources are commits**, `contributes-to` = merges — read live from the frontmatter you already have.

### Highlights
- **Three panes** — sidebar navigator (Areas / Projects / Reviews + search), the graph, and an inspector (goal, next-action, last-edited, cadence, linked notes).
- **Packed ↔ Spread** lane toggle; collapse/expand subtrees; the active area "breathes" to a full spread while the rest stay compact.
- **Focus** a node or area (click again to deselect); **search** jumps to any node.
- **Attention indicator** — set a `cadence:` and overdue projects get a small amber dot beside their last-edited time.
- Right-angle filleted connectors; resizable panes.
- Read-only and live; zero runtime dependencies. Desktop-only for this release.
